return L(i)end,621677-621677,function(E,R)local L=j(R)local s=function(...)return w(E,{...},R,L)end return s end,function(E,R)local L=j(R)local s=function(s,A,Q)return w(E,{s;A;Q},R,L)end return s end,function(E,R)local L=j(R)local s=function(s,A,Q,o,i)return w(E,{s,A;Q,o;i},R,L)end return s end,function(E,R)local L=j(R)local s=function()return w(E,{},R,L)end return s end,{},function(E,R)local L=j(R)local s=function(s,A)return w(E,{s;A},R,L)end return s end return(v(8460269-(-228260),{}))(L(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[R(788604-766243)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
